subject: [PATCH v2 14/21] nfsd: reject reclaim LOCK after RECLAIM_COMPLETE

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the NFSv4 server where it incorrectly accepts reclaim LOCK requests after RECLAIM_COMPLETE has been sent by a client. The fix adds a check to ensure that the client's NFSD4_CLIENT_RECLAIM_COMPLETE bit is set before accepting a reclaim request, as required by RFC 8881. This prevents the server from accepting invalid reclaim requests when the grace period is still active.
